/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/bsc_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/mc_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/src/bsc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/src/mc.cpp.o -o run_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
